basic_details.job_title: Panchayat College Bargarh Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Panchayat College Bargarh Guest Faculty Notification 2026 has been released on 27 June 2026 on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Panchayat College Bargarh Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 70 years. Please refer to the official notification for age relaxation details.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in the concerned subject from a recognized University with at least 55% marks or its equivalent grade with a second class in a Bachelor's Degree
qualification.details: Master's Degree in the concerned subject from a recognized University with at least 55% marks or its equivalent grade with a second class in a Bachelor's Degree

selection_process: Career marks Teaching experience Viva voce test Teaching demonstration (5 minutes)

all_official_links.label: Download Panchayat College Bargarh Guest Faculty Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Panchayat College Bargarh Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for online registration for Panchayat College Bargarh Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 is 03 July 2026. Candidates should ensure all formalities are completed by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the walk-in interview date for Guest Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for Guest Faculty posts at Panchayat College Bargarh is scheduled for 03 July 2026, as mentioned in the introductory paragraph. Please check the official notification for specific timings and venue details.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for Guest Faculty at Panchayat College Bargarh?
faq.answer: There is 1 vacancy available for the Guest Faculty post at Panchayat College Bargarh. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for detailed post-wise distribution.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for Guest Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for Guest Faculty positions at Panchayat College Bargarh is 70 years. There is no minimum age specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q5. What are the essential qualifications required for Guest Faculty?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's Degree in the concerned subject from a recognized University with at least 55% marks or its equivalent grade, along with a second class in a Bachelor's Degree.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for Panchayat College Bargarh Guest Faculty Recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Panchayat College Bargarh Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026. The application process is free of cost.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for Guest Faculty at Panchayat College Bargarh?
faq.answer: The selection process for Guest Faculty includes evaluation of career marks, teaching experience, a viva voce test, and a teaching demonstration of 5 minutes. Candidates will be assessed on these criteria.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification for Panchayat College Bargarh Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 can be found on the official website or through the direct link provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates attending the walk-in interview must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies (ID proof, educational certificates, experience, category), a duly filled application form (if required), and extra passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website for Panchayat College Bargarh?
faq.answer: The official website for Panchayat College Bargarh recruitment is https://hims.odisha.gov.in/guest_faculty/home. Candidates can visit this site for more information and updates regarding the recruitment process.
